content: 2024–2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems can be reframed as hierarchical curiosity filters, where the agent’s long-term memory prioritizes retention of unexpected, uncertainty-reducing experiences exactly the way a general agent’s intrinsic curiosity module (ICM) prioritizes exploration of new state spaces. This creates a closed-loop learning system where memory structure shapes the agent’s exploratory choices, which in turn update the memory’s prioritization rules.
